# Ben Mizrahi — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A high-end Israeli event and lifecycle photographer specializing in bar/bat mitzvah portfolios and Torah aliyah ceremonies. The brand philosophy centers on authentic realism — maximum optical sharpness, natural textures, and cinematic lighting with zero artificial filters. The aesthetic is 'Quiet Luxury': understated elegance that lets the raw emotion and genuine moments speak for themselves. The photographer uses cutting-edge equipment and prioritizes documentary-style storytelling, capturing the small sacred details (tallit, Torah scroll, family glances) alongside the high-energy celebration moments.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Ben Mizrahi
A high-end Israeli event and lifecycle photographer specializing in bar/bat mitzvah portfolios and Torah aliyah ceremonies. The brand philosophy centers on authentic realism — maximum optical sharpness, natural textures, and cinematic lighting with zero artificial filters. The aesthetic is 'Quiet Luxury': understated elegance that lets the raw emotion and genuine moments speak for themselves. The photographer uses cutting-edge equipment and prioritizes documentary-style storytelling, capturing the small sacred details (tallit, Torah scroll, family glances) alongside the high-energy celebration moments.

## Services/Products
- בוק בר/בת מצווה - סטייל אישי וביטוי עצמי
- עלייה לתורה - רגש משפחתי, מסורת ופרטים קטנים
- צילום אירועים - דוקומנטרי, ריקודים ואנרגיה

## Target Audience
- משפחות ישראליות המחפשות צלם לאירועי בר/בת מצווה, עלייה לתורה ואירועים חגיגיים
- משפחות ישראליות חוגגות
- מתכנני אירועים יוקרתיים
- מארגני אירועים עסקיים

## Industry
צילום מקצועי / אירועים

---
